firm_description: Mid-size regional underwriter focused on Texas special districts and school districts. Strong retail distribution network across Texas community banks. Established relationships with Texas financial advisors.

strategic_priorities: Growing K-12 school district market share in North Texas
Maintaining MUD franchise in Harris/Fort Bend/Brazoria counties
Expanding into Texas city GO market

distribution_profile.retail_reach: Strong — 40+ Texas community bank and credit union accounts
distribution_profile.bank_qualified_demand: Very strong — local banks actively seek BQ paper

bidding_capabilities.notes: Experienced with Texas net effective interest rate conventions
